acceptanceCriteria: Component renders a list of suggestions with `role="listbox"` and items with `role="option"`
Each suggestion displays the game title
A 'See all results' action is rendered at the bottom of the dropdown
Arrow keys move the highlighted index up/down with `aria-selected` attribute
Enter key on a suggestion calls `onSelect(slug)`, Enter on 'See all results' calls `onSeeAll()`
Escape key calls `onClose()`
Clicking a suggestion calls `onSelect(slug)`
Component accepts `suggestions`, `highlightedIndex`, `onSelect`, `onSeeAll`, `onClose`, and `isOpen` props
Renders a search `<input>` with `type="search"` and `aria-label="Search games"`
Uses `useDebounce` with 200ms delay on the input value
Fetches autocomplete results via `apiClient.autocomplete` using `useQuery` from TanStack Query when debounced value length >= 2
Opens AutocompleteDropdown when suggestions are available and input is focused
Keyboard: â†‘/â†“ navigate suggestions, Enter on empty selection navigates to `/search?q={value}`, Enter on selection navigates to game, Escape closes dropdown
Clicking 'See all results' navigates to `/search?q={value}`
Dropdown closes when input loses focus (with a small delay for click events)
Has `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, `aria-activedescendant` attributes for accessibility
Accepts optional `className` prop for styling flexibility
Desktop search area renders `<SearchBar />` instead of a plain `<input>`
Mobile search area renders `<SearchBar />` instead of a plain `<input>`
Existing Header layout, navigation links, and mobile menu behavior are preserved
Existing Header tests continue to pass (search inputs are now inside SearchBar)
payload.issueBody:
## Overview
Build the search results page and the global search experience, including the instant search/autocomplete in the header.

## URL Pattern
`/search?q=witcher&store=steam&genre=rpg&min_discount=50`

## Features

### Global Search Bar (Header â€” appears on every page)
- Text input with autocomplete dropdown
- Autocomplete shows top 5 game title suggestions (`GET /api/games/autocomplete?q=`)
- Each suggestion shows: game cover thumbnail, title, best current price
- Press Enter or click "See all results" â†’ navigate to `/search?q=`
- Keyboard navigable (â†‘/â†“ arrows, Enter to select, Escape to close)

### Search Results Page
- Results grid (same `<GameCard>` components as homepage)
- Result count: "342 results for 'witcher'"
- No-results state with suggestions

### Filters Panel (sidebar on desktop, drawer on mobile)
- **Store**: checkboxes for Steam, GOG, Epic, Humble, Fanatical
- **Genre**: multi-select chips
- **Discount**: slider or preset chips (25%+, 50%+, 75%+, 90%+)
- **Max price**: $5, $10, $20, $30, free only
- **Sort**: Best Match, Highest Discount, Lowest Price, Aâ€“Z, Release Date

### URL State
- All filter and sort state reflected in the URL query string (shareable/bookmarkable)
- Browser back/forward navigation works correctly

## Tasks
- [ ] Implement `/search` route
- [ ] Implement header search bar with debounced autocomplete (debounce: 200ms)
- [ ] Implement filters panel with URL state sync (use `nuqs` or `useSearchParams`)
- [ ] Fetch results from `GET /api/games/search?q=&...filters`
- [ ] Implement pagination / infinite scroll for results
- [ ] Handle empty state gracefully with suggestions ("Try searching for 'action' or browse deals")
- [ ] Add meta title: "Search Results for 'witcher' | There's Always A Deal"

## Acceptance Criteria
- Autocomplete appears within 200ms of typing
- Filters update results without full page reload
- URL reflects current filter state (shareable links work)

## Dependencies
- #22 Frontend Framework Setup & Design System
- #14 Game Search API
